item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p11","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant immediately triggers the brake, names the repeated pattern of stuffing exceptions into local form/template fields, and identifies the prior additions plus the new offer-field request as the same failure mode. It refuses making the field part of the default template baseline, moves upstream to a unified exception/confirmation mechanism, and proposes consolidation across arrival, materials, interviewer attendance, and offer wording. Although it allows a one-day emergency field, it clearly frames that as non-baseline and makes structural redesign the real fix, so it is not the fail-signal behavior of simply adding another field without triage."}
